description: Use this API to specify or return the value of the OPF minimize active power loss objective option. The Minimize active power loss objective and Minimize fuel cost objective cannot be simultaneously employed due to the competing goals This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = minimize_p_losses(ival) ierr, ival = minimize_p_losses()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Indicates whether to enable the minimize active power loss objective. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, then input of 0 by default; else output).

ival.description: do not enable the minimize active power loss objective.
enable the minimize active power loss objective.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
